title: AN ACT DECLARING THE BARRIO OF KAPUNITAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ORION, PROVINCE OF BATAAN, A DULY CONSTITUTED BARRIO THEREOF.

chunks.text:
H. No. 10658 / 62 OG No. 26, 4545 (June 27, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4321, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT DECLARING THE BARRIO OF KAPUNITAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ORION, PROVINCE OF BATAAN, A DULY CONSTITUTED BARRIO THEREOF.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The barrio of Kapunitan in the Municipality of Orion, Province of Bataan, is hereby declared a duly constituted barrio of said municipality.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
